name: ui-sports-board
description: SportsBoard — top-down soccer/sports game: select units, move them to tiles, score goals. game-shell + canvas-2d with live input wiring (TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and a RESET HUD control.

schema.name: ui-sports-board
schema.description: SportsBoard — top-down soccer/sports game: select units, move them to tiles, score goals. game-shell + canvas-2d with live input wiring (TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and a RESET HUD control.

emits.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click
Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click
Fired when a goal is scored; team is 'player' or 'enemy'
Resets the match to initial state

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click

events.name: Goal
events.description: Fired when a goal is scored; team is 'player' or 'enemy'

events.name: Reset
events.description: Resets the match to initial state

assetBaseUrl.label: Asset Base Url
assetBaseUrl.description: Base URL prepended to asset paths

features.label: Features
features.description: Features (goals, markers, etc.) on the board

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
